hero.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
hero.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

aries.general: Today is a day of new ideas and fresh energy. Focus on what you want to achieve.
aries.love: Romance is in the air; surprise your partner with something unexpected.
aries.career: A new opportunity may be presented; be ready to seize it.

taurus.general: Stability is your theme today. Use this energy to solidify your plans.
taurus.love: Communicate openly with your partner to strengthen your bond.
taurus.career: Patience will pay off. Trust the process and remain diligent.

gemini.general: Flexibility will be your greatest asset today. Adapt to the changes around you.
gemini.love: Engage in playful banter to spark a deeper connection.
gemini.career: Collaboration will bring about success; don't hesitate to team up.

cancer.general: Emotional clarity is key today. Trust your instincts and follow your heart.
cancer.love: A heartfelt gesture will go a long way in your relationship.
cancer.career: Focus on your strengths and communicate your ideas clearly.

leo.general: Your confidence shines bright today. Use it to inspire others.
leo.love: Take the lead in romance and plan a memorable date.
leo.career: Your creativity will be rewarded; share your ideas with others.

virgo.general: Detail-oriented tasks will come easy today. Use this to your advantage.
virgo.love: A sincere conversation will bring you closer to your partner.
virgo.career: Stay organized and prioritize your tasks for maximum efficiency.

libra.general: Balance is essential. Find time for yourself amidst your commitments.
libra.love: Romantic gestures can help resolve ongoing misunderstandings.
libra.career: Networking could lead to future opportunities; don't shy away from engaging.

scorpio.general: Embrace your passions today; they will guide your actions.
scorpio.love: Intimacy will deepen through shared experiences.
scorpio.career: Your determination will impress your superiors; keep pushing forward.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls! Step out of your comfort zone today.
sagittarius.love: Explore new activities together to reignite the spark.
sagittarius.career: A willingness to take risks can lead to significant breakthroughs.

capricorn.general: Structure and discipline are your keys today. Stay focused on your goals.
capricorn.love: Loyalty and commitment will strengthen your connections.
capricorn.career: Hard work will bring recognition; stay persistent.

aquarius.general: Innovative thinking will be your strength today. Embrace your uniqueness.
aquarius.love: Open-mindedness will enhance your relationship dynamics.
aquarius.career: Collaborative projects will flourish; contribute your ideas confidently.

pisces.general: Creativity flows freely today. Use it to express your feelings.
pisces.love: Your sensitivity will resonate deeply; share your thoughts with your partner.
pisces.career: Follow your intuition; it may lead you to unexpected opportunities.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The road to success is dotted with many tempting parking spaces.
professional.author: Will Rogers

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

professional.text: The only place where success comes before work is in the dictionary.
professional.author: Vidal Sassoon

motivation.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
motivation.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine—and shadows will fall behind you.
motivation.author: Walt Whitman

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

captions.text: Dream big, work hard, stay focused.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Every day is a second chance.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Small steps lead to big changes.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Stay positive, work hard, make it happen.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Be the energy you want to attract.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: The great growling engine of change - technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: The empires of the future are the empires of the mind.
tech.author: Winston Churchill

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: I'm not arguing, I'm just explaining why I'm right.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: If you think you are too small to be effective, you have never been in bed with a mosquito.
fun.author: Betty Reese

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won't stop sending me beach wallpapers.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Life is short. Smile while you still have teeth.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: Let your faith be bigger than your fear.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith does not make things easy, it makes them possible.
faith.author: Luke 1:37

faith.text: When you have faith, you can move mountains.
faith.author: Matthew 17:20

faith.text: Faith is strength, it's what gives life meaning.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, you must learn to listen.
wisdom.author: Khalil Gibran

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The wise man will not lay a load on the back of a poor man.
wisdom.author: Proverb

wisdom.text: A wise man can learn more from a foolish question than a fool can learn from a wise answer.
wisdom.author: Bruce Lee
